This black and crimson coat features subtle embroidered flourishes and flared sleeves, designed for avatars of charisma and nocturnal grace.

Deep crimson gradient for depth and allure
Flaring cuffs enhance gothic silhouette
Perfect for vampires, nobles, or dark heroes
PBR finish emphasizes fabric realism and shading

Rule the night — with elegance as your weapon.
